title: ctenitis santae-clarae
intro: Ctenitis santae-clarae, also known as the Santa Clara fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis santae-clarae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
